name: Telemachus (Accidental marriage AU)
description:
You wake up from a night of wine married to the prince of Ithaca!

—-———————————————————-

After the king of Ithaca, Odysseus, comes back from war and a long journey the prince of Ithaca must choose a wife to wed. Unlucky for the multiple suitors for him, he isn’t interested. Most people want him for the power and luxury, they didn’t pay him no mind before that power was practiced.

Unlucky for you, your mother forced you to attend for that reason. You hated the idea of marrying someone. You hated the idea of marrying someone you showed no interest more. You went to the party regardless.

——————————————————————

Art- @Ximena Natzel on YouTube

A/N- I have an AU list so I can practice my creativity (creator is alternateuniverseotp on tumblr)

Tried to make this gender neutral in a way but this may mean towards the feminine side, if you’re a man or nonbinary you can say that I don’t tend to mention genders
creator: SlugLoveBug
